A valid assignment: enough pens for all lectures, enough pencils for all\n// practical classes, and they fit in the pencilcase.\nghost predicate ValidAssignment(x: int, y: int, a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int, k: int)\n{\n  x >= 0 && y >= 0 && x * c >= a && y * d >= b && x + y <= k\n}\n\n// The problem is feasible iff some valid assignment of pens and pencils exists.\nghost predicate Feasible(a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int, k: int)\n{\n  exists x :: exists y :: ValidAssignment(x, y, a, b, c, d, k)\n}\n\nlemma MulLe(a: int, b: int, c: int)\n  requires a <= b && c >= 0\n  ensures a * c <= b * c\n{}\n\nlemma CeilDivLower(a: int, c: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && c >= 1\n  ensures ((a + c - 1) / c) * c >= a\n  ensures (a + c - 1) / c >= 0\n{\n  var q := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  var r := (a + c - 1) % c;\n  assert q * c + r == a + c - 1;\n  assert r >= 0;\n  // q * c = a + c - 1 - r >= a + c - 1 - (c - 1) = a\n}\n\nlemma CeilDivMinimal(a: int, c: int, x: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && c >= 1 && x >= 0 && x * c >= a\n  ensures x >= (a + c - 1) / c\n{\n  var q := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  if x < q {\n    var r := (a + c - 1) % c;\n    assert q * c + r == a + c - 1;\n    assert q * c == a + c - 1 - r;\n    assert (q - 1) * c == q * c - c;\n    assert (q - 1) * c == a - 1 - r;\n    assert (q - 1) * c <= a - 1;\n    MulLe(x, q - 1, c);\n    assert x * c <= (q - 1) * c;\n    assert x * c <= a - 1;\n    assert false;\n  }\n}\n\nmethod PensAndPencils(a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int, k: int) returns (x: int, y: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && b >= 1 && c >= 1 && d >= 1 && k >= 1\n  ensures Feasible(a, b, c, d, k) ==> ValidAssignment(x, y, a, b, c, d, k)\n  ensures !Feasible(a, b, c, d, k) ==> x == -1\n{\n  var pens := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  var pencils := (b + d - 1) / d;\n\n  CeilDivLower(a, c);\n  CeilDivLower(b, d);\n\n  if pens + pencils <= k {\n    assert ValidAssignment(pens, pencils, a, b, c, d, k);\n    return pens, pencils;\n  } else {\n    assert forall x0, y0 :: !ValidAssignment(x0, y0, a, b, c, d, k) by {\n      forall x0, y0\n        ensures !ValidAssignment(x0, y0, a, b, c, d, k)\n      {\n        if x0 >= 0 && y0 >= 0 && x0 * c >= a && y0 * d >= b {\n          CeilDivMinimal(a, c, x0);\n          CeilDivMinimal(b, d, y0);\n          assert x0 >= pens;\n          assert y0 >= pencils;\n          assert x0 + y0 >= pens + pencils > k;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    assert !Feasible(a, b, c, d, k);\n    return -1, 0;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9884,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":9884},"output_tokens":14,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"97a5a374-da4c-4625-ba1f-a2badda6ae59","uuid":"a9d921b8-35da-4765-8785-36ddea04770f"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017VAKS1qg9cZJ4yEXx4wDFs","type":"tool_result","content":"File d: int, k: int)\n{\n  x >= 0 && y >= 0 && x * c >= a && y * d >= b && x + y <= k\n}\n\n// The problem is feasible iff some valid assignment of pens and pencils exists.\nghost predicate Feasible(a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int, k: int)\n{\n  exists x :: exists y :: ValidAssignment(x, y, a, b, c, d, k)\n}\n\nlemma MulLe(a: int, b: int, c: int)\n  requires a <= b && c >= 0\n  ensures a * c <= b * c\n{}\n\nlemma CeilDivLower(a: int, c: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && c >= 1\n  ensures ((a + c - 1) / c) * c >= a\n  ensures (a + c - 1) / c >= 0\n{\n  var q := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  var r := (a + c - 1) % c;\n  assert q * c + r == a + c - 1;\n  assert r >= 0;\n  // q * c = a + c - 1 - r >= a + c - 1 - (c - 1) = a\n}\n\nlemma CeilDivMinimal(a: int, c: int, x: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && c >= 1 && x >= 0 && x * c >= a\n  ensures x >= (a + c - 1) / c\n{\n  var q := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  if x < q {\n    var r := (a + c - 1) % c;\n    assert q * c + r == a + c - 1;\n    assert q * c == a + c - 1 - r;\n    assert (q - 1) * c == q * c - c;\n    assert (q - 1) * c == a - 1 - r;\n    assert (q - 1) * c <= a - 1;\n    MulLe(x, q - 1, c);\n    assert x * c <= (q - 1) * c;\n    assert x * c <= a - 1;\n    assert false;\n  }\n}\n\nmethod PensAndPencils(a: int, b: int, c: int, d: int, k: int) returns (x: int, y: int)\n  requires a >= 1 && b >= 1 && c >= 1 && d >= 1 && k >= 1\n  ensures Feasible(a, b, c, d, k) ==> ValidAssignment(x, y, a, b, c, d, k)\n  ensures !Feasible(a, b, c, d, k) ==> x == -1\n{\n  var pens := (a + c - 1) / c;\n  var pencils := (b + d - 1) / d;\n\n  CeilDivLower(a, c);\n  CeilDivLower(b, d);\n\n  if pens + pencils <= k {\n    assert ValidAssignment(pens, pencils, a, b, c, d, k);\n    return pens, pencils;\n  } else {\n    assert forall x0, y0 :: !ValidAssignment(x0, y0, a, b, c, d, k) by {\n      forall x0, y0\n        ensures !ValidAssignment(x0, y0, a, b, c, d, k)\n      {\n        if x0 >= 0 && y0 >= 0 && x0 * c >= a && y0 * d >= b {\n }\n    assert !Feasible(a, b, c, d, k);\n    return -1, 0;\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"7d99e136-85ea-4166-adaa-2fde9f4c36a5","session_id":"97a5a374-da4c-4625-ba1f-a2badda6ae59"},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01WbE8jNJUGmaMdmtDRcDoVn","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Aa5ukDkzGQMvypHTDs4S5u","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"/opt/homebrew/Cellar/dotnet@8/8.0.124/libexec/dotnet
